name: hidden_g_benchmark_seed_v2
description: Tracked seed benchmark derived from the accepted local eval plus source-backed manual scaffold additions. Manually curated high-risk cases keep item/slot gold pages, while accepted eval spillover remains regression-only suspect gold. Scaffold-backed additions are limited to reviewed support-undercoverage or explicit-page-anchor cases with minimal_required_support_pages.
